name: Captain Moonlite
summary: Andrew George Scott, also known as Captain Moonlite, though also referred to as Alexander Charles Scott and Captain Moonlight, was an Irish-born New Zealand immigrant to the Colony of Victoria, a bushranger there and in the Colony of New South Wales, and an eventual and current day Australian folk figure.
original_caption: Andrew George Scott, alias Captain Moonlite

wikipedia_summary.title: Captain Moonlite
